children.name: ValidateCommand
children.purpose: Check that the command is one of the four valid commands
children.behavior: If command is not in ['send', 'history', 'create_channel', 'join'], return error result

semantic_outputs.name: validation_result
semantic_outputs.description: Either success with command or error result

postconditions: If invalid, parent returns error immediately

children.name: SendMessage
children.purpose: Handle 'send' command: validate membership, store message, update last_seen, notify members
children.behavior: Check user is member of channel via channels store, if not return error. Store message in messages store with timestamp. Update user's last_seen in users store. Return success with message data.

semantic_inputs.name: channels
semantic_inputs.description: Channel data store for membership check

semantic_outputs.name: send_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data, message

guarantees: Only sends if user is member

children.name: GetHistory
children.purpose: Handle 'history' command: retrieve last 100 messages from channel sorted by timestamp descending
children.behavior: Query messages store for all messages with given channel_id, sort by timestamp descending, limit to 100, return as list

semantic_outputs.name: history_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success and list of messages

children.name: CreateChannel
children.purpose: Handle 'create_channel' command: create new channel with unique name, set creator as first member
children.behavior: Check if channel name already exists in channels store, if so return error. Generate new channel_id, store channel with name, members=[user_id], created_by=user_id. Return success with channel data.

semantic_inputs.name: channels
semantic_inputs.description: Channel store for reading and writing

semantic_outputs.name: create_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success and new channel data

postconditions: New channel exists in channels store

children.name: JoinChannel
children.purpose: Handle 'join' command: add user to channel member list if not already a member
children.behavior: Check if user is already in channel's members list, if so return error. Add user_id to members list. Return success.

semantic_inputs.name: channels
semantic_inputs.description: Channel store for reading and writing

semantic_outputs.name: join_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success and message

postconditions: User added to channel members if not already

decomposition_rationale: The parent ChatApp function is decomposed into one validation child and four command-specific children, each handling a distinct operation. ValidateCommand ensures only valid commands proceed, then the parent routes to the appropriate child based on command. Each child performs its specific task using the available data stores, and returns a result dict that the parent aggregates into the final output.

dataflow_sketch.note: If invalid, return error; else proceed
